content.query:
SELECT
[_account_id]  as AccountID
,[_campaign_id]  as CampaignID
,[_adset_id]  as AdsetID
,[_ad_id]  as AdID
,[_publisher_platform]  as PublisherPlatform
,[_platform_position]  as PlatformPosition
,[_date_start]  as DateStart
,[_date_stop]  as DateStop
,[_clicks]  as Clicks
,[_cost_per_action_type]  as CostPerActionType
,[_cpc]  as CPC
,[_cpm]  as CPM
,[_cpp]  as CPP
,[_ctr]  as CTR
,[_currency]  as Currency
,[_frequency]  as Frequency
,[_impressions]  as Impressions
,[_inline_link_clicks]  as InlineLinkClicks
,[_outbound_clicks_ctr]  as OutboundClicksCtr
,[_outbound_clicks]  as OutboundClicks
,[_reach]  as Reach
,[_spend]  as Spend
,[_unique_clicks]  as UniqueClicks
,[_unique_ctr]  as UniqueCtr
,[_unique_inline_link_click_ctr]  as UniqueInlineLinkClickCtr
,[_unique_inline_link_clicks]  as UniqueInlineLinkClicks
,[_unique_link_clicks_ctr]  as UniqueLinkClicksCtr
,[_unique_outbound_clicks_ctr]  as UniqueOutboundClicksCtr
,[_unique_outbound_clicks]  as UniqueOutboundClicks
,[_actions]  as Actions
,[_action_values]  as ActionValues
,[_unique_actions]  as UniqueActions
,[_video_avg_time_watched_actions]  as VideoAvgTimeWatchedActions
,[_video_p100_watched_actions]  as VideoP100WatchedActions
,[_video_p25_watched_actions]  as VideoP25WatchedActions
,[_video_p50_watched_actions]  as VideoP50WatchedActions
,[_video_p75_watched_actions]  as VideoP75WatchedActions
,[_video_p95_watched_actions]  as VideoP95WatchedActions
 FROM [RIVERY].[fb_ads_insight_report_platform]
